div.p: (Mr. Conger reports the unanimous agreement of the diplomatic corps to demand, as Article I in treaty, as an ultimatum, the death of the nine persons named in the decree referred to in his telegram of October 3, adding Tung Fu-hsiang and Yü Hsien, and designating others for commensurate punishment when discovered. Asks if Department approves; he advises it.
Has made protest against removal of the Yangtze viceroys or the appointment of reactionary officials.)
